header_title.description: App sutiy jach'a uta uñt'ayatawa. Jach'a markanakan manq'atak utjkaspawa.

header_subtitle.description: App sutiy uñt'ayatawa jach'a uta q'ipir ukan.

home_page_hero_title.description: Jach'a uta q'ipir ukan jach'a sutinak.

home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Jach'a uta q'ipir ukan jach'a sutinakar uñt'ayata.

home_page_featured_title.description: Manq'atak q'ipirinakan uñt'ayatawa ukhamaraki manq'atak uñt'ayasiñatak.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Manq'atak utjkaspawa q'ipirinakan uñt'ayata. {minutes} minutu qillqt'añani.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Jach'a ch'aki wayna k'iwru chashu, suman utji manq'a, ukhamaraki phisqa wayllutaki.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: San Marzano ch'arki, jach'a mozzarella, ukhamaraki basil ukhamarak Neapolitan pizza clásico.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Q'ipi wayna marinado tacos, ananá, qullu, ukhamaraki q'illu ch'uñu tortilla jach'a.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Sum uñtawi wayna, tomate manteka ukhamaraki aroma especia sauce.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: T'ika phisqa wayllutu q'ipiri shrimp, tofu, mani, ukhamaraki tamarindo sauce.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Phisqa, suman crepes Nutella, phisqa frutilla, ukhamaraki whip cream.
